productDisplayName: Nike Men As Kobe Hunt Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Navy Blue round neck t-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, has graphic print on the chest and is engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Rule the court with a do-or-die attitude in the Kobe "Hunt or Be Hunted" men's Basketball t-shirt - a sweat-wicking essential inspired by the game's deadliest force. It is made of Dri-FIT fabric to wick sweat away and help keep you dry and comfortable all day, while you sweat it out at the court, winning those baskets in style.
